CinematicStory.quote3: that feels like scenes from a film.

PortfolioGrid.intro: We're Trung and Vân a Vietnam elopement and intimate wedding photographer
PortfolioGrid.body: The beautiful lands of Viet Nam, as well as many other destinations are the playground where we love to document engagements, weddings, elopements. No matter where your destination is, we will reach you to document your wedding. We will tell your story through emotional visual language. We will be there to capture your rawest feelings, all the unique moments between you both, setting them in the beauty of the surrounding landscapes. Do you feel like discovering more?

testimonials.quote: We simply fell in love with this shoot! It turned out incredibly romantic and memorable. The photographer created a cozy atmosphere and helped us relax in front of the camera. Every photo conveys our emotions and love story. Thank you so much!
testimonials.author: MARK & ANNA

testimonials.quote: A truly magical experience. Snapshot Hanoi captured every silent glance and every loud laugh. Our wedding album feels like a piece of art that we will cherish forever. Professionalism at its finest in the heart of Hanoi.
testimonials.author: HUY & DIANE

testimonials.quote: Fixing our moments in Vietnam was the best decision. The team made us feel so comfortable, and the final results exceeded all our expectations. Timeless, elegant, and raw—exactly what we dreamed of.
testimonials.author: SANDRA & OLIVIER

testimonials.quote: Incredible attention to detail. They didn't just take photos; they told our story through their lens. The atmosphere was intimate and the memories they preserved are priceless for our family.
testimonials.author: SILKY & RON

Footer.tagline: Snapshot Hanoi was created for the new ways we live and work. We make beautiful photography around the world.
Footer.bookSubtitle: Get started for free. Add your whole team as your needs grow.

AboutUs.bio0: We are Trung and Vân, a duo in life and art. Our journey together began in the vibrant streets of Hanoi in 2013, leading us to say "I do" just a year later in January 2014. Since 2012, we have dedicated our lives to capturing the essence of love through weddings and elopements. Today, we call Hanoi home, where we are raised by the joy of our two daughters, Quynh Chi and Quynh Thy, while our work takes us across Vietnam, Asia, and far beyond.
AboutUs.bio1: After a decade of exploring every corner of the photographic world, we discovered that our hearts beat fastest when telling the stories of couples. We are not interested in staged perfection; instead, we are passionate about raw, honest emotions—the quiet whispers, the unbridled laughter, and the authentic feelings that make your story unique. Our style is a fusion of cinematic atmosphere and documentary truth, captured through the timeless lens of the Leica M system.
AboutUs.bio2: Recognized globally for our vision, we are honored to have been ranked among the elite. From being named the Best Wedding Photographer in Vietnam in 2023 to reaching the Top 20 Wedding Photographers in the World in 2025, these accolades are a testament to our commitment to the art of storytelling.

Packages.heading: Packages
Packages.note1: The cost does not cover travel expenses for remote locations, special transportation such as boat rides, or entry fees to attractions like Disney World, zoos, historical sites, villas, museums, and palaces.
Packages.note2: This pricing list reflects our standard packages. If you're looking for something tailored to your specific needs, feel free to contact us. We're happy to provide you with a custom quote that fits your unique requirements.
Packages.note3: Once your photoshoot is completed, we will deliver your edited images through a password-protected online gallery within 4 business days.
Packages.note4: We understand how important your memories are, which is why we securely store all of your images for two years. If you ever lose them, we'll be here to help you retrieve your photos.
